content:
🔍 Work, Healthcare, and Interdisciplinary Applications

1️⃣. Three Lenses of Application
• Lens 1: Work & Professions
• A healthcare-related example + one other field (law, AI, journalism, marketing, etc.)
• Lens 2: Family & Personal Life
• Examining themes within personal, social, and emotional experiences
• Lens 3: The Macro Lens
• A zoomed-out, interdisciplinary look at society, history, and cultural evolution

🔍 Historical Anchor Section

Each week’s historical anchor will now expand to include:
✔ Context of the time period (What was happening in the world?)
✔ Key figures in the literary/art movement (Brief overviews of major authors/artists/works)
✔ Technological & societal changes (How did communication, inventions, or cultural shifts influence storytelling?)
